latestDirtyPackageRefreshStatus: source-feedback Task 3 residual selected-spell route-task queue, Task 8 six-driver active reducer diagnostic seed, FCSF-04 object stale public route-history evidence, FCSF-05 reaction/interrupt payload taxonomy evidence, FCSF-06 character/sheet/handoff rejection and resource payload evidence, and SQNT-07B/C/D feature-species-metamagic route evidence are packaged in cleanroom-input. FCSF-04 dirty replay later accepted 6 connector rows and covered 7 object-route obligations, FCSF-05 dirty replay accepted all 5 connector rows, FCSF-06 dirty replay accepted 30 reducer-route witness rows and recorded 14 target blockers, SQNT-07B dirty replay accepted 15 selected species/passive-adjacent rows with 2 inherited Adrenaline Rush rows out of scope, SQNT-07C dirty replay accepted 30 selected metamagic rows, and SQNT-07D dirty replay accepted 3 active-feature spell-benefit rows; no fresh target acceptance is claimed from these dirty replays.

laneSizingPolicy.reason: Fresh expansion lanes should stay smaller than dirty rehearsal lanes because each accepted row must also strengthen verifier coverage and cleanroom-boundary evidence.

FCSF-04 later resolves that blocker as source input by packaging public object stale route-history evidence; dirty replay accepts 6 connector rows and covers all 7 Starry Wisp object obligations. Fresh target replay is still pending.
